title: Terminal Talk config.json
description: User-facing configuration for Terminal Talk. Edit ~/.terminal-talk/config.json to override defaults. VS Code and any editor that honours `$schema` / `json.schemas` will autocomplete these keys and validate values on save.

voices.description: Voice IDs for TTS playback. See app/lib/voices.json for the full 47-entry edge + 6-entry openai catalogue.

openai_clip.description: Used only when openai_api_key is set (premium fallback).

auto_continue_after_click.description: When on, clicking a dot plays that clip and auto-continues through the remaining clips in time order — regardless of whether they were already heard. When off, a click plays only the clicked clip.

palette_variant.description: Colour palette variant. 'default' = the standard 8-colour palette; 'cb' = colour-blind-friendly (Paul Tol's 'muted' scheme, distinguishable under deutan/protan/tritan). EX5 / H3 Option 2.

speech_includes.description: Which markdown features get read aloud. Per-session overrides live in the sessions panel.

window.description: Last-saved window position. Managed by main.js; don't hand-edit.

openai_api_key.description: Optional — premium TTS fallback. Stored encrypted via Electron safeStorage after v0.3 (see D2).

_comment.description: Free-form note. JSON has no native comments; _comment is ignored by the loader.
